import React,{useEffect,useState} from 'react' import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import Axios from 'axios'; export const Category = () => { const [Products, setProducts] = useState([]) const url= "http://localhost:5000/api/product/getProducts" useEffect(() => { Axios.post(url) .then(response=>{ if(response.data.success){ setProducts(response.config.data.products) console.log(response.data.products) } else{ alert("failed to fetch product data") } }) }, []) return ( <>
